title: Tax treatment of cryptoasset Exchange Traded Notes
body: "This page clarifies the tax treatment of Cryptoasset Exchange Traded Notes (cETNs) following changes to Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) rules from 8 October 2025, which allow retail investors to access these products. The update outlines how cETNs can be held within ISAs and registered pension schemes, and explains the transitional arrangements for ISA managers.  "
